ddls:
CREATE TABLE "installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the installation is deployed */,
  "sql_username" TEXT /* Username for SQL database admin account */,
  "sql_password" TEXT /* Password for SQL database admin account */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Host name to be used for the FotoWeb site */,
  "site_https" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the site uses HTTPS */,
  "iis_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the IIS web site to deploy FotoWeb application on */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of the installation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the installation was last updated */,
  "sql_server_version" TEXT /* Version of the SQL Server */,
  "iis_version" TEXT /* Version of IIS */,
  "fotoweb_version" TEXT /* Version of FotoWeb */,
  "installation_status" TEXT /* Status of the installation (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "installation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site administrator */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "site_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the site */,
  "site_firewall_rules" TEXT /* Firewall rules for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_site_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, site manager, user) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installation the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., install, update, remove) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installation_logs_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installation_logs_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_id") REFERENCES installations ("installation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the configuration entry belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the configuration change */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, pending) */,
  "config_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_configurations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the installation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, manage, admin) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was performed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_id") REFERENCES installations ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security policy */,
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installation the policy applies to */,
  "policy_key" TEXT /* Key of the security policy parameter */,
  "policy_value" TEXT /* Value of the security policy parameter */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the policy change */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "policy_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_policies_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_id") REFERENCES installations ("installation_id")
)
